headline: Why Blackstone (BX) Is Up 5.5% After Launching a Record $6.3 Billion Life Sciences Fund
summary: In recent days, Blackstone announced the final close of Blackstone Life Sciences VI, an oversubscribed life sciences fund capped at US$6.30 billion, marking the largest private fund ever dedicated to the sector. This record-sized vehicle reinforces Blackstone’s position as a major capital provider to life sciences companies, expanding its fee-earning base and deepening its presence in an area where specialized financing and regulatory expertise are increasingly important. Next, we’ll examine...

headline: Private Equity Sales Slump as AI, War Bring New Stress Fractures
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Private equity sales have fallen by more than a third this year, as developments in artificial intelligence and war in Iran heap pressure on a subdued exit market.Buyout firms were sellers in deals valued at about $103 billion in the first quarter, data compiled by Bloomberg show. Though still above historical averages, the figure is roughly 36% lower than the same period a year ago and stands out in an M&A market flush with megadeals. It’s a blow for private equity firms eager to
